rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT MATZA AND NOREEN MATZA REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Corrected Trust Amendment Nunc Pro Tunc
rulings.Rulings: Continued by the Court to August 25, 2014 for proper notice (notice sent 7/22 for hearing on 7/28 when 30 dyas notice is required). New notice must be sent to Ms. Herlihy no later than July 26, 2014 with the new hearing date. In addition, an amendment to a petition requires the same notice as the petition it amends. All parties entitled to notice must receive proper notice of the amendment.
